title: DeFiLabs - REKT
relevance_summary: Staking contract with a backdoor function allowing the funder address to drain the contract of user deposits

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls withdrawFunds() from the funder address.
prevention.trigger: withdrawFunds() called by funder address in single tx

red_flags: Audit not covering newly added contracts
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls withdrawFunds() from the funder address.
summary: DeFiLabs rug-pulled $1.6M from its users on BSC using a backdoor function in their staking contract. The contract allowed the funder address to drain the contract of user deposits. Despite audits, the contract was not covered, leading to the rugpull.
